pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires modifying the fins to have a '3.0-degree cant angle'.
Verifier script logic uses a 0.5-degree default tolerance for scoring the fin cant angle.
Task description explicitly dictates saving to '~/Documents/rockets/spin_stabilized_rocket.ork'.
Task description explicitly dictates writing the report to '~/Documents/exports/spin_stabilization_report.txt'.
Verifier script defines a total of 100 possible points and explicitly uses 60 as the minimum passing score.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the 'A simple model rocket' example design created by Sampo Niskanen to have a 3.0-degree fin cant angle (±0.5 degree tolerance). The modified rocket design must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/spin_stabilized_rocket.ork' and a report discussing spin physics and altitude must be written to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/spin_stabilization_report.txt'. A passing score requires 60 out of 100 possible points in the verifier.
